BSides South Jersey 2026 tickets are officially "ON SALE"!

Register today: https://lnkd.in/ewgMR3-p

The event takes place April 18th in Glassboro, NJ. This community-driven cybersecurity conference brings together security professionals, IT experts, students, and enthusiasts to share knowledge, foster collaboration, and promote ethical hacking practices. Join us for insightful talks, hands-on workshops, and valuable networking opportunities from 9 AM to 4
PM EST. Together, we build a safer digital future.

#BSidesSouthJersey
#Cybersecurity #InformationSecurity #ProfessionalDevelopment #EthicalHacking

We’re excited to welcome Hack The Box as a sponsor of BSides South Jersey at Rowan University.

Hack The Box plays a major role in advancing hands-on cybersecurity training and supporting the global security community. Their partnership helps us deliver an engaging, educational event for students and professionals alike.

When? - April 18th, 2026 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM EST
Where? - Rowan University — 201 Mullica Hill Rd, Glassboro, NJ 08028

Thank you, Hack The Box, for supporting cybersecurity education and the South Jersey security community.

#BSidesSouthJersey #HackTheBox #CyberSecurity #InfoSec #RowanUniversity

Thrilled to announce a key partnership for BSides South Jersey!

We're excited to welcome NBC 10 and Telemundo 62 as our official Media Sponsors! This is a monumental addition to our community-driven conference. 🚀New Mid-Career Security Job🚀

Great opportunity to join the Microsoft Security Organization!

The Exposure Management team is looking for a Security Researcher to help identify new design patterns, attacker techniques, and security controls to enhance cloud posture management for enterprise environments!

Ideal candidates should have a passion for AI and experience in Security Research and Vulnerability Management! 

If that's you, apply ASAP using the link 👇CC!

author.occupation: Security CTO @ Microsoft | vCITSO | Board Member

comments.text: Love seeing Exposure Management getting this kind of investment. AI-driven posture management and real-world attacker pattern modeling is where cloud security is heading. The teams building this inside Microsoft are shaping the standard for everyone else.
